title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
